km.Workington, Cumberland, England: woរគីនតុន, cuមប៊ើលែន, ប្រទេសអង់គ្លេស

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Christopher II Curwen於大約1423年出生在英國波藍德沃爾金頓時，他的父親Sir Thomas Curwen I18歲，母親Anne Lowther23歲。他於大約1445年與Anne Pennington結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1499年4月6日在他的家鄉享年77歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Christopher II Curwen于大约1423年出生在英国波藍德沃爾金頓时，他的父亲Sir Thomas Curwen I18岁，母亲Anne Lowther23岁。他于大约1445年与Anne Pennington结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1499年4月6日在他的家乡享年77岁。

nameMeanings.name: Curwen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and English (Lancashire): habitational name from a place called Culewen (now Colvend) in Kirkcudbrightshire. The family was early established in Lancashire, where it was often pronounced without the -w-; see Corrin and Currin .

variants.name: Corrin
meanings: Irish and Manx: shortened form of Mac Torin, from Gaelic mac ‘son (of)’ + Old Norse Thórfinnr (from Thórr, the name of the Scandinavian thunder god, + the ethnic designation Finnr). Compare Turpin . This name has occasionally been confused with Corin .

nameMeanings.name: Christopher
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Greek name Khristophoros, from Khristos ‘Christ’ + pherein ‘to bear’. This was popular among early Christians, conscious of the fact that they were metaphorically bearing Christ in their hearts. A later, over-literal interpretation of the name gave rise to the legend of a saint who actually bore the Christ-child over a stream; he is regarded as the patron of travellers. In England the name was uncommon in the Middle Ages, but became very popular in the 16th century, especially in parts of the North.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Christopher II Curwen was born about 1423, in Workington, Cumberland, England, his father, Sir Thomas Curwen I, was 18 and his mother, Anne Lowther, was 23. He married Anne Pennington about 1445. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 6 April 1499, in his hometown, at the age of 77.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Christopher II Curwen est né environ 1423, à Workington, Cumberland, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Curwen I, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Anne Lowther, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Anne Pennington environ 1445. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 6 avril 1499, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 77 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Christopher II Curwen um 1423 in Workington, Cumberland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas Curwen I 18 und seine Mutter Anne Lowther 23. Er hat um 1445 Anne Pennington geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 6. April 1499 im Alter von 77 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Christopher II Curwen è nato il circa 1423 nel Workington, Cumberland, England, il suo padre, Sir Thomas Curwen I, aveva 18 anni e il suo madre, Anne Lowther, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Anne Pennington circa 1445. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 6 aprile 1499, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 77 anni.

ja.Workington, Cumberland, England: イギリスクウンバーランドウオルキントン
ja.lifeSummary: Sir Christopher II Curwenが約1423年にイギリスクウンバーランドウオルキントンで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Curwen Iは18歳，母Anne Lowtherは23歳であった。約1445年にAnne Penningtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1499年4月6日に故郷で77歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Christopher II Curwen(이)가 대략 1423년 영국 c벌랜드 워킨그턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas Curwen I(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne Lowther(은)는 23세였다. 그는 대략 1445년 Anne Pennington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1499년 4월 6일 그의 고향에서 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Christopher II Curwen nasceu aproximadamente 1423, em Workington, Cumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Curwen I, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Anne Lowther, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne Pennington aproximadamente 1445. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 6 de abril de 1499, em sua cidade natal, com 77 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Christopher II Curwen родился около 1423 г. в местности воркингтон, кумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas Curwen I было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Lowther, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Pennington около 1445 г. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 6 апреля 1499 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 77 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Christopher II Curwen nació aproximadamente 1423, en Workington, Cumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas Curwen I, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Anne Lowther, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Anne Pennington aproximadamente 1445. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 6 de abril de 1499, en su pueblo, a la edad de 77 años.
